summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; public class AtomicFlow implements IOrchestrationFlow { private final AiService aiService; private final IterationManager manager; public AtomicFlow(AiService aiService, IterationManager manager) { this.aiService = aiService; this.manager = manager; } @Override public OrchestratorResponse execute(String request, TaskContext context) throws Exception { context.log("[KERNEL] Executing Atomic Flow (Delegating to DarwinFlow)."); try { return new DarwinFlow(aiService, manager).execute(request, context); } catch (Exception e) { manager.getGitManager().rollback(); throw e; } } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
